required_anchors: ### 2.3a Dynamic criteria are a separate contingent population
A contingent criterion is legitimate only when it cites the exact response span
missing mandatory verification blocks the corresponding capability

claim_boundary: The record proves only that the cited design basis existed in the frozen Git object and remains present in the live canonical map; it does not validate the synthetic criteria, grader accuracy, capability, expert validity, professional readiness, or cross-domain generalization.
